title: Joby Demonstrated its Air Taxi in Manhattan, but You Can’t Fly in It Yet
description: Aviation start-ups and the Trump administration want to replace helicopters with electric aircraft, but the new vehicles still have to pass arduous tests before the public can use them.
author: Niraj Chokshi

title: Powerful A.I. Super PACs Duel Over the Midterms: ‘This Is a War’
description: One super PAC is allied with Anthropic. The other is tied to OpenAI. They’re both spending millions to influence this year’s elections.
author: Theodore Schleifer

title: What’s Next for Blue Origin After Rocket Explosion
description: Jeff Bezos was gaining ground on Elon Musk’s SpaceX and Starlink. Thursday’s rocket explosion on a launchpad creates a major setback.
author: Karen Weise

title: Interesting Times: Why Are We Still Driving?
description: Confronting the weirdness of a Waymo future.
author: Ross Douthat and Sophia Alvarez Boyd

title: I Tried to Sell My House With A.I.
description: Over five frantic days, I gambled my family’s life savings on a hunch that A.I. could outperform a real estate agent.
author: Stuart A. Thompson

title: Anthropic Tops OpenAI to Become the World’s Most Valuable A.I. Start-Up
description: Anthropic raised $65 billion in new fund-raising that put its value at $900 billion, ahead of OpenAI’s last valuation of $730 billion, as the companies duel for A.I. dominance.
author: Mike Isaac and Cade Metz

title: A.I. Is Making Scams Hard to Spot. Here’s How to Protect Yourself.
description: A criminal could be masquerading as a celebrity, web store or family member asking for your money. Detecting scams requires a new approach.
author: Brian X. Chen

title: In Argentina, U.S. Tech Billionaire Peter Thiel Finds An Escape
description: The billionaire’s new roots in Argentina are said to be partly motivated by concerns about the future of the United States and shared beliefs with Argentina’s right-wing leader.
author: Emma Bubola and Ryan Mac

title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
description: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?
author: David Streitfeld

title: One Job That Is Growing in the A.I. Era? Cybersecurity Experts.
description: Demand for security engineers has surged as artificial intelligence generates a glut of new code and models like Anthropic’s Mythos create new concerns.
author: Kate Conger

title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
description: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.
author: Adam Satariano and Paul Mozur
